the Lord. In my dreary dungeon I saw the Lord sitting on his throne, and all the host of heaven standing by him on his right hand and on his left. And the Lord said, ‘Ahab lives but to sin. He shall fall! Who will persuade him to go up to Ramoth-Gilead, that he may meet his doom?' Beings so benevolent, who joy over each humble and repentant man, demur to volunteer upon so dread- a mission. But a…

נעשה אדם WE WILL MAKE MAN — The meekness of the Holy One, blessed be He, they (the Rabbis) learned from here: because the man is in the likeness of the angels and they might envy him, therefore He took counsel with them (Midrash Tanchuma, Shemot 18 and see Genesis Rabbah 8). And when He judges the kings He likewise consults His heavenly council, for thus we find in the case of Ahab to whom Micha…
